---
name: ⚠️ Program Risk or Delivery Blocker
about: Use this template to log architectural, security, or resource blocks impacting the critical path.
title: '[RISK] '
labels: ['risk', 'high-priority']
---

### ⚠️ Risk Event Description
Provide a clear, detailed overview of the current risk or delivery blocker.

### 🚨 Potential Impact Area
- [ ] Timeline Delay (Specify estimated weeks/days)
- [ ] Security/Compliance
- [ ] Developer Velocity
- [ ] Cloud Infrastructure Cost

### 🔍 Root Cause
What triggered this risk event or dependency bottleneck?

### 🛡️ Proposed TPM Mitigation Plan
Detail the tactical steps, meetings, or technical workarounds planned to bypass this block.
